html:
Exclusive to:

“This thorny husk deals its damage when attacked.”

-

The Bramble Husk is a Character-specific Armor Item craftable only by Wormwood. It requiring 2 Living Logs and 4 Stingers to craft.

It has 525 durability and absorbs 80% of physical damage, the same amount as a Log Suit. Whenever a Character wearing the Bramble Husk is attacked by a Mob, 22.6 average damage is dealt to each Mob within a radius of one tile.

It also has the added bonus of preventing damage from Spiky Bushes and Cactus. This means that one can harmlessly harvest Spiky Bushes and Cactus without any worry. Durability of the armor is not decreased when this effect occurs. Also, the player won't take any damage from picking Roses while wearing Bramble Husk.

The Bramble Husk is flammable and can be used as Fuel. Damage multipliers have no effect on damage dealt (Wigfrid's x1.25 damage multiplier, Warly's spicy foods +20% damage bonus, etc.).

This effect will not deal damage to followers. Be careful, though, as it could damage Beefalo in the case that it has no saddle. It will be considered a mob and take damage, which will set all domestication progress to 0.


Usage

Skins

Main article: Belongings

Woven - Elegant
Ancient Collection
Overgrowth Husk
Time has turned these tender vines tough and gnarled.

Tips

  • This item is extremely efficient in farming Tentacle Spikes in the caves by killing Tentapillars. Its AoE damage kills the Baby Tentacles instantly. One husk alone is enough to farm 10 spikes without using helmets, and with minimal health lost. One should not forget to travel through the Big Slimy Pit, as there is an equal amount of loot on the other side of the hole.
  • This item is renewable as the crafting materials, Stingers and Living Logs, are both renewable.
  • Monsters that tend to swarm together, such as Spiders, Baby Tentacles, Frogs, and Bees can find themselves in a great struggle as the AoE attacks plow through the creatures similar to Abigail.

Trivia

  • This is the only armor that has more durability in Don't Starve Together than in Don't Starve.
  • This is also a great set of armor for quick sanity food as picking cactus will not hurt the player while worn.

Assets

Bramble HuskOvergrowth Husk

  • Dropped
  • Equipped

  • Dropped
  • Equipped

Gallery

  • Concept art of Bramble Husk (bottom left) from Rhymes With Play #241.

Exclusive to:
“The best offense is a good defense.”
–Wilson
“I think Wormwood made it.”
–Willow
“Mighty Wolfgang does not need armor!”
–Wolfgang
“So my outside matches my inside.”
–Wendy
“HE MADE IT WITH HIS POOP HANDS”
–WX-78
“I believe our friend knit it himself.”
–Wickerbottom
“All natural safety precautions.”
–Woodie
“Who's frail now?”
–Maxwell
“My ally is surely a ströng warriör.”
–Wigfrid
“We're ready to let spikes fly!”
–Webber
“I'll have to be very careful putting it on.”
–Warly
“Pokey protection”
–Wormwood
“Odd design. How do you wear it without pricking yourself?”
–Winona
“Who'd like to give an imp a hug? Hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“Plant made it!”
–Wurt
“No hugging while you're wearing that.”
–Walter
“Sometimes it pays to have a prickly exterior.”
–Wanda
“This thorny husk deals its damage when attacked.”
-
The Bramble Husk is a Character-specific Armor Item craftable only by Wormwood. It requiring 2 Living Logs and 4 Stingers to craft.

Durability of the armor is not decreased when this effect occurs. Also, the player won't take any damage from picking Roses while wearing Bramble Husk.
The Bramble Husk is flammable and can be used as Fuel. Damage multipliers have no effect on damage dealt (Wigfrid's x1.25 damage multiplier, Warly's spicy foods +20% damage bonus, etc.).
This effect will not deal damage to followers. Be careful, though, as it could damage Beefalo in the case that it has no saddle. It will be considered a mob and take damage, which will set all domestication progress to 0.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Vỏ Mâm Xôi là một Vật phẩm Giáp dành riêng cho Nhân vật chỉ có thể chế tạo được bởi Wormwood. Nó cần 2 Gỗ Sống và 4 Stinger để chế tạo.
